channel.title: Meme on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem
channel.description: Recent content in Meme on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem

item.title: Phrase from nearest book meme
item.description:
Meme from codeblog

* Grab the nearest book.
* Open it to page 56.
* Find the fifth sentence.
* Post the text of the sentence in your journal along with these instructions.
* Don’t dig for your favorite book, the cool book, or the intellectual one: pick the CLOSEST.

My result:

“We’ll cover more on where to place your name servers in Chapter 8, Growing Your Domains.” - DNS and BIND , 2nd Edition , Paul Albitz & Cricket Liu
